description: Machine-readable index of Skill Audit Loop protocols, runners, and required per-skill run artifacts. The verifier at skill-graph/scripts/check-audit-manifest.js consumes this file. ADR 0015 documents the project-owned-prompts convention this serves.

phase_prompts.role: Per-model ENRICH/propose pass (research repo+web, write proposal + novelty memo, no commit). Dispatched by lib/audit/propose-one.js.
Per-model cross-review pass (keep/wrong/missing JSON over every other proposal). Dispatched by lib/audit/cross-review-one.js.
Per-model revise pass (revise own proposal in light of feedback; hash-authoritative convergence). Dispatched by lib/audit/revise-one.js.
Per-mandatory-frontier verify pass (own-contribution coverage + advisory-disposition honesty + reproduced evidence on load-bearing claims). Dispatched by lib/audit/verify-one.js.

protocols.execution_modules_note: The per-model dispatch primitives (lib/audit/{propose,cross-review,revise,curate,verify}-one.js) are CODE, not prompts, and are intentionally NOT indexed here — this manifest indexes protocols, runner + phase prompts, command bodies, and required run artifacts. The primitives are covered by the package unit tests (test:unit).

required_artifacts_per_skill.name: comprehension.json
required_artifacts_per_skill.notes: Any graded comprehension_verdict (PROVISIONAL/PASS/SHALLOW/REDUNDANT) requires a gradeable, dimension-tagged comprehension.json on disk per the May 22-25 incident with backend/mcp-builder/token-cost-estimation. Comprehension enums per schemas/SKILL_METADATA_PROTOCOL_schema.json:261-272 are disjoint from application enums (APPLICABLE/MIXED/HARMFUL/FALSE_POSITIVE) — those belong to application_verdict and have their own artifact (evals/application.json), not comprehension.json. SKIPPED_BASELINE_HIGH (procedural early-skip), UNVERIFIED (no assessment), and NA (no artifact intended) are explicitly NOT graded and require no artifact.

aliases.notes: Lane configuration relocated to project-owned path per ADR-0016 surface #1 (2026-05-25). The legacy .opencode/skill-audit-lanes.json was DELETED (git history is the archive per delete-dont-archive.md); this is a historical relocation record, so from_deleted:true tells the path-integrity check to skip from-existence and validate only the to target. Consumer scripts/skill/skill-audit-claim.js reads the new path.
Multi-model merge protocol relocated to project-owned path per ADR-0016 surface #2 (2026-05-25). The workspace path retains a thin stub redirect for historical-artifact pointer stability.

Claude Code slash-command resolver (thin shim). Defers to the canonical command body, which defers to SKILL_AUDIT_LOOP.md Part 3. (Corrected 2026-06-10T: previously pointed at skill-audit-loop-single-model.md, a routing chain that no longer exists — the shim actually resolves to the command body.)
Claude Code slash-command resolver (thin shim). The shim frontmatter marks it deprecated (superseded_by: skill-audit-loop).

OpenCode slash-command resolver. Thin pointer that @imports the Part 3 runbook and lists the four single-model runner prompts (single-model/codex-autonomous-v5/batch-worker-v4/minimal-iteration). (Corrected 2026-06-10T: previously pointed at a single prompt.)

OpenCode queue wrapper / launcher — a verbatim-consumed loop prompt (run-loop-sweep.sh 'prompt'-type) that OWNS its own queue selection, checkpoints, and continuation logic and defers the per-skill contract to Part 3. (Corrected 2026-06-10T: previously pointed at codex-autonomous-v5.md, a different contract.)
Back-compat pointer stub at workspace prompts dir.
